title: Fragment: The Sepulchre Of Memory.
content:
And where is truth? On tombs? for such to thee
    Has been my heart - and thy dead memory
    Has lain from childhood, many a changeful year,
    Unchangingly preserved and buried there.
meaning:
"Fragment: The Sepulchre Of Memory." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
